Elon Musk is a business magnate and entrepreneur who has founded or co-founded companies like PayPal, SpaceX, Tesla, Neuralink, and The Boring Company. He is known for his ambitious goals, such as reducing global warming through sustainable energy and making humanity a multi-planetary species.

John Cena is an American professional wrestler, actor, television host, and former rapper. He is best known for his time in the WWE, where he won multiple championships and became one of the most popular and successful wrestlers of all time. He has also appeared in numerous films and television shows, and has become a successful actor and entertainer outside of the wrestling world.

Narendra Modi is the 14th and current Prime Minister of India. He has been in office since 2014 and is a member of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). Before becoming Prime Minister, he served as the Chief Minister of Gujarat from 2001 to 2014. Modi is known for his economic development policies, his efforts to promote Hindu nationalism, and his strong leadership style. He has implemented various initiatives and programs aimed at improving the lives of Indians, such as the Swachh Bharat Abhiyan (Clean India Mission) and the Make in India program.

Gurgaon, also known as Gurugram, is a city located in the state of Haryana, India. It is a major financial and industrial hub, and is part of the National Capital Region (NCR) of Delhi. Gurgaon is known for its modern infrastructure, shopping malls, and business parks, and is home to many multinational companies and startups.

Sohna is a town located in the Gurgaon district of Haryana, India. It is situated about 24 kilometers south of Gurgaon city and is known for its natural hot springs, which are believed to have medicinal properties. Sohna is also a popular tourist destination, with attractions such as the Sohna Lake, the Damdama Lake, and the Aravalli Hills. The town is also home to several resorts, hotels, and spas, making it a popular weekend getaway for people from nearby cities.
The current weather in Sohna is mostly sunny with a temperature of 31.1°C and a wind speed of 4.7 km/h.

The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) is an Indian youth-based satirical political movement founded on May 16, 2026, by Abhijeet Dipke. It was created in response to remarks made by the Chief Justice of India, Surya Kant, who called some activists and unemployed youth "cockroaches" and "parasites of society". The movement has gained rapid popularity online, with over 350,000 sign-ups and over 20 million followers on Instagram within a week of formation. The CJP campaigns against broader societal, economic, and political issues affecting the Indian youth, and has organized offline protests and community service activities across various states. Although it is not registered as a political party with the Election Commission of India, the CJP has become a voice for India's burnt-out youth, representing the overqualified, underemployed, and politically frustrated.
